_comment: Machine-checkable calendar of moving legal/regulatory dates (P47). Mirrors the 'Known moving dates to watch' prose in docs/FRESHNESS.md as dated JSON. Drift invariant 43 (advisory) surfaces any date whose effective (or phase_2) has passed while verified_after < effective, so a took-effect-but-still-pending date can never sit silently. STAGED / diagnostic only: applying a correction is a separate human step recorded in volatile-corrections.2026-07-14.json. verified_after is the last date the corresponding registry source was confirmed AFTER the rule took effect (null = not yet re-verified since).

dates.description: New York synthetic-performer advertising disclosure law (S8420-A): in effect 2026-06-09.
California AI Transparency Act (SB 942, amended by AB 853): operative 2026-08-02, with a phase-2 obligation set effective 2027-01-01.
EU AI Act Article 50 (transparency / AIGC labelling obligations): applies 2026-08-02. Proposed as a new registry source; see eu-ai-act-seed.json.
Florida 9th Edition (2026) Building Code adoption window closes 2026-12-31.
North Carolina 2024 Building Code expected effective circa 2027 (approximate; confirm the exact adoption date closer to the window).
